rationale: Qodo summary comment only; actionable items were tracked and handled in the specific review threads below.
Qodo rollup duplicates the individual review comments that were classified separately in this ledger.
describe_execution now offloads managed-run store lookup with asyncio.to_thread in api_service/api/routers/executions.py.
The async execution route now moves blocking managed-run filesystem lookup off the event loop via asyncio.to_thread.
ManagedRunStore now reads JSON with explicit UTF-8 encoding in moonmind/workflows/temporal/runtime/store.py.
Store tests now use timedelta arithmetic instead of replace(microsecond=...) to avoid overflow flakes.
The second timestamp-overflow test case was updated to use timedelta-based increments as well.
The long-running live-logs integration test now uses a larger timeout budget and clearer spool-file timeout diagnostics.
This is a follow-up refactor suggestion, not a correctness blocker for the live-logs PR. The current fix set kept the review scoped to blocking issues.
Copilot review summary only; the actionable file-level comments were classified individually.
api_service/api/routers/executions.py now imports asyncio for the to_thread call used in describe_execution.
Gemini review summary only; the actionable review comments were handled individually.
The managed-run taskRunId fallback is now executed through asyncio.to_thread to avoid blocking the API event loop.
The task-detail missing-binding state logic now returns binding_missing for progressed running executions and waiting_for_launch for pre-launch ones.
MoonMind.AgentRun now gates the parent-workflow binding payload behind a Temporal patch id and adds coverage for the new-path binding plus legacy replay-safe branch presence.
ManagedRuntimeLauncher now normalizes nullable workflow_id with str(workflow_id or '').strip() or None and includes a regression test for None.
